chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-815 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.4487/2025. 2. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 3. For orders on M.A.No.4488/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 04.09.2025. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G. -.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner is present in person; however, his counsel as intimated by Mr. Ameer Ahmed Dahani has left Court premises for proceeding to Karachi with his personal work. Learned Addl. A. G as well as learned Addl. P. G present in Court waive notice of instant petition and draw attention of the Court towards Annexure-B Page-21 which is diary dated 14.07.2025 penned down by Civil Judge & JM-II Kamber, perusal whereof shows that the petitioner has furnished his surety before the trial Court on 14.7.2025. The Law Officers therefore, submit that the purpose of petition in view of dicta laid down by learned apex Court reported as (PLD 2013 Supreme Court 401) has been served and seek its disposal. Admittedly, the case has been challaned and the petitioner along with co-accused have been joined trial and are attending the trial Court. Therefore prayer so made through present lis is untenable. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications with direction to petitioner to attend the trial Court till final decision of the case. The petitioner however, is at liberty to file appropriate application before the trial Court, if so advised. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
